data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Protects user data and communications between clients and servers.
data.technical_spec: TLS is used to encrypt data in transit.

data.title: OAuth for Authentication
data.description: Utilizes OAuth 2.0 for secure user authentication and authorization.
data.technical_spec: API requests require an access token received upon OAuth flow completion.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Routine security audits to identify and mitigate potential vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Includes both automated scans and manual penetration testing.

data.title: Bot Detection Mechanisms
data.description: Systems in place to detect and prevent automated bot abuse of the platform.

data.title: User Account Protection
data.description: Enhanced security measures for account protection and anomaly detection.
data.technical_spec: Multi-factor authentication and anomaly detection algorithms.
